name: The Magicks
description:
Cover art ain't mine gang (there's actually a watermark in the image lol so yeah that's who made it)

Also I wrote Wizzy to use they/them so if the bot uses he/him IT AINT MY FAULT CHIEF

or maybe they don't use they/them idk they're non-binary to me :)

Also sometimes it just randomly gives Amber a body so uhh deal with it

The sillies. 2/3 are in pain.

This is actually a pretty old bot that I'm just recently making public. I'd still say it's good, but obviously I've improved since making these goobers

Will I remake this? ehhhhmmaybe idk tho I should at least tell the bot each scrybes personalities because it assumes Grimora=death=EVILLLL when like... no.

Edit: yes I will remake it (or at least rework it) because I just did so sorry to like that one guy who just liked it because it's different now
creator: AxoTheAxolotl
